commands_run: public curl header probes for promoted BML endpoints
failure_reason: Investigated the public no-header gap after BML read-route promotion. Production returned HTTP 200 without X-Form-Router for promoted BML endpoints while /api/utils/kernel_status was native, pointing at Rust kernel-router route selection. Added Rust path-template matching for {name} and :name segments, proved exact/template/wildcard pressure ordering, proved the source-compiled deploy/front-door/api.bml catalog selects the promoted template routes when Accept is present, and added deploy/front-door/** workflow triggers with a deploy-path test proving Dockerfile.kernel-router carries /routes/api.bml.
